name: Yesim
verdict: Best for longer stays and hotspot-heavy use — unlimited plans, solid support
exitCountry: Unverified by field test (international routing confirmed)

throttlePolicy.dailyCap: Not published (daily limit exists per FUP)
throttlePolicy.notes: Yesim confirms a Fair Use Policy applies to unlimited China plans and that 'speed may be throttled after heavy usage,' but does not publish the specific daily GB cap or the throttled speed. Plans: $4.66/day up to $65.20/30 days. Hotspot included at no extra charge by default.

pros: Unlimited plans well-suited for 10+ day stays
Hotspot included by default at no extra cost
24/7 live support with ~5 min average response time
cons: Daily throttling cap not published — can't plan around it
Relatively expensive per-day ($4.66+) vs fixed-data plans for short trips
Throttling speed after cap not specified
